title: Single cell RNA sequencing of mouse macrophage
author: Jeremie Breda Arka Banerjee Mihaela Zavolan
content: E-MTAB-11814 Single cell RNA sequencing of mouse macrophage RNA-seq of coding RNA from single cells EFO EFO_0005684 Mus musculus A novel approach to single cell analysis to reveal intrinsic differences in immune marker expression in unstimulated macrophages from BALB/c and C57BL/6 mouse strains
